character.core_question: How is it built — and what does each part do?
character.wardrobe_episode: dark henley or chore jacket, work trousers — NOT gym casting kit

voice.signature_beat: How is it built — and what does each part do?
voice.prompt_suffix: Deep measured baritone; stillness fills frame; voice low.

continuity_lock_verbatim: CONTINUITY LOCK @Elijah-001: identical presenter face, workwear wardrobe, blueprint bench set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.

episode_reuse.host_shots: Lead every prompt with 37-year-old Elijah Brooks; workwear; warehouse or blueprint bench set
episode_reuse.diagram_payoff: Label AS-BUILT / SPEC / EXPLODED VIEW / NOT TO SCALE on technical diagram beats
episode_reuse.on_screen_label: Blueprint · Built logic, part by part.
